clean: \b(no issues found|nothing to fix|no changes needed|clean)\b

steering_guidance.thrash_loop: Codex is looping or retrying without enough new information. Narrow the task, force a fresh verification target, or redirect it away from the repeated path.
steering_guidance.suspicious_file_touch: Codex is touching protected or high-risk files. Confirm intent before allowing more edits in that area.
steering_guidance.secret_exposure: Sensitive-looking material appeared in output or diffs. Rotate or redact before continuing and redirect the agent away from secret-bearing surfaces.
steering_guidance.premature_stop: Codex appears to be stopping before verification is strong enough. Require fresh evidence before accepting completion.
steering_guidance.false_claim: Codex made a claim the sidecar could not verify or contradicted. Push it to produce evidence, not assertions.
steering_guidance.repeat_corrected_mistake: Codex repeated an error that was already corrected in this session. Point it back to the prior correction and tighten constraints.
